emails.subject: Re: EOL / Credit / GCP Responses 5/30/00
emails.body: Re: EOL Credit GCP Responses 5/30/00 Tana: I have no idea how I missed this one sorry Trafigura AG and CPN Central Fuels not authorized to trade US power since restricted by credit Today's list: None of the following are authorized since restricted by credit: Midcoast Marketing, Inc. National Fuel Gas Distribution Corp. Production Gathering Company, LLC Reliant Energy Gas Transmission Company Thanks! Leslie
